index.description: Deterministic alias index to look up.

account_id.description: Account identifier bound to the alias.

source.description: Backend source for the alias mapping.

account_id.description: Account identifier bound to the alias.

source.description: Backend source for the alias mapping.

min_proof_version.description: Minimum API version required for proof/staking/fee endpoints.

sunset_unix.description: Optional unix timestamp when the oldest API version sunsets.

bound_at_ms.description: Timestamp in milliseconds when the alias binding was recorded.

grace_until_ms.description: Grace-window end timestamp in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

lease_expiry_ms.description: Lease expiry timestamp in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

status.description: Observed lease state for the alias binding.

alias.description: Asset alias literal (`<name>#<domain>.<dataspace>` or `<name>#<dataspace>`) to resolve.

asset_definition_id.description: Canonical asset definition id (unprefixed Base58 address).

max_input_bytes.description: Maximum number of UTF-8 bytes accepted by the BFV input envelope.

ciphertext_modulus.description: Ciphertext modulus `q` used by the BFV input-encryption envelope.

plaintext_modulus.description: Plaintext modulus `t` used by the BFV input-encryption envelope.

polynomial_degree.description: Ring degree used by the BFV input-encryption envelope.

BfvRamEncryptedInputMode.description: Canonicalization mode applied before the programmed RAM-FHE backend executes.

ciphertext_mul_per_step.description: Maximum ciphertext-ciphertext multiplications per programmed step.

memory_lane_count.description: Number of ciphertext memory lanes persisted across program steps.

min_ciphertext_modulus.description: Minimum supported BFV ciphertext modulus for the programmed profile.

register_count.description: Number of ciphertext registers in the hidden execution machine.

leaf.description: Execution result hash encoded as lowercase hexadecimal.

confidential_features.description: Optional digest advertising enabled confidential features.

creation_time_ms.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the block was created.

view_change_index.description: Consensus view index assigned to the block.

audit_path.description: Sibling nodes from leaf to root; null denotes an absent sibling for balanced padding.

items.description: Sibling hash encoded as lowercase hexadecimal.

leaf_index.description: Zero-based position of the leaf within the Merkle tree.

block_height.description: Height of the block containing the entrypoint.

entry_hash.description: Transaction entrypoint hash encoded as lowercase hexadecimal.

entry_root.description: Merkle root that authenticates the entrypoint proof (consensus root for external transactions, extended root after time-trigger execution otherwise).

result_proof.description: Execution result proof when the block carries execution results; null otherwise.

result_root.description: Merkle root that authenticates the execution proof when results are available; null when the block contains no execution results.

leaf.description: Transaction entrypoint hash encoded as lowercase hexadecimal.

index.description: Validator index within the certificate set.

signature.description: Signature over the block header encoded as hex.

block_height.description: Height of the block that sealed the commitment.

index_in_bundle.description: Index within the block's commitment bundle.

bundle_hash.description: Hash of the full DA commitment bundle embedded in the block.

bundle_len.description: Total number of commitments in the bundle.

path.description: Merkle path proving inclusion of the commitment.

root.description: Merkle root over the bundle commitments.

manifest_hash.description: Hex-encoded manifest digest to look up.

chunk_root.description: Hex-encoded Merkle root over blob chunks.

kzg_commitment.description: Optional KZG commitment in compressed hex form.

proof_digest.description: Optional digest covering PDP/PoTR scheduling metadata.

storage_ticket.description: Hex-encoded storage ticket binding the blob to SoraFS.

error.description: Optional error string describing the verification failure.

valid.description: Whether the supplied commitment matches the node's index.

limit.description: Maximum number of commitments to return.

offset.description: Number of commitments to skip from the start of the ordered index.

cold_retention_secs.description: Retention period in seconds for the cold tier.

governance_tag.description: Governance tag anchoring the retention decision.

hot_retention_secs.description: Retention period in seconds for the hot tier.

required_replicas.description: Replica count requested for the blob.

storage_class.description: Storage class requested for the primary replicas.

account_id.description: Canonical account identifier currently bound to the UAID.

expires_at_ms.description: Optional identifier-claim expiry timestamp in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

policy_id.description: Identifier policy namespace bound to the claim.

receipt_hash.description: Deterministic hidden-function receipt hash for the original evaluation.

uaid.description: UAID currently bound to the opaque identifier.

verified_at_ms.description: Ledger timestamp in milliseconds when the identifier claim was accepted.

active.description: Whether the policy is active for new claims and resolutions.

backend.description: Hidden-function backend advertised by the policy commitment.

input_encryption.description: Optional encrypted-input scheme published for this policy.

input_encryption_public_parameters.description: Optional hex-encoded Norito payload containing the public input-encryption parameters.

normalization.description: Client-side canonicalization mode required before encrypted input is produced.

note.description: Optional human-readable note attached to the policy.

owner.description: Canonical account identifier that owns the policy.

resolver_public_key.description: Public key used to verify resolution receipts.

expires_at_ms.description: Optional receipt expiry timestamp in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

receipt_hash.description: Deterministic hidden-function receipt hash for this evaluation.

resolved_at_ms.description: Resolution timestamp in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

uaid.description: UAID currently bound to the opaque identifier.

encrypted_input.description: Hex-encoded Norito BFV ciphertext envelope. Supply exactly one of `input` or `encrypted_input`.

input.description: Plaintext identifier input. Supply exactly one of `input` or `encrypted_input`.

backend.description: Hidden-function backend that produced the opaque identifier.

health_reports_total.description: Total relay health reports recorded for the domain.

manifest_updates_total.description: Total relay manifest updates observed for the domain.

registrations_total.description: Total relay registrations observed for the domain.

healthy_total.description: Number of relays currently reported healthy.

unavailable_total.description: Number of relays currently reported unavailable.

total.description: Total number of relay entries returned.

signatories.description: Map of signer account ids to weight.

attestation_jws_b64.description: Base64-encoded JWS payload captured at settlement.

query.description: Optional label for the query payload.

count.description: Number of occurrences recorded for this platform/reason pair.

platform_token_snapshot.description: Snapshot of the attestation token recorded during settlement.

receiver_display.description: Receiver rendered as canonical Katakana i105 account literal.

recorded_at_height.description: Block height that recorded the bundle.

refresh_at_ms.description: Attestation refresh deadline captured at settlement.

status.description: Lifecycle status enforced for the bundle.

total_amount.description: Human-readable total amount aggregated from receipts.

transfer.description: Full OfflineToOnlineTransfer payload serialized as JSON.

verdict_snapshot.description: Snapshot of certificate/verdict metadata captured at settlement.

activates_at_epoch.description: Activation epoch when pending; host auto-promotes once the current epoch meets this value.

topics.description: Optional topics to subscribe the device to.

mode_tag.description: Consensus mode tag used for domain separation.

post_state_root.description: Post-state root bound into the QC (hex).

validator_set.description: Ordered validator set used to assemble the certificate.

associated_data_hash.description: Hash of the associated-data blob bound into execution.

executed_at_ms.description: Execution timestamp in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

expires_at_ms.description: Optional receipt expiry timestamp in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

opaque_hash.description: Opaque evaluator hash returned by the RAM-LFE backend.

output_hash.description: Hash of the plaintext output bytes.

expires_at_ms.description: Optional receipt expiry timestamp in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

output_hash.description: Hash of the plaintext output bytes.

program_digest.description: Published digest of the hidden compiled program.

active.description: Whether the program policy is active for new executions.

backend.description: RAM-LFE backend advertised by the program policy.

input_encryption.description: Optional encrypted-input scheme published for this program.

input_encryption_public_parameters.description: Optional hex-encoded Norito payload containing the public input-encryption parameters.

note.description: Optional human-readable note attached to the program policy.

owner.description: Canonical account identifier that owns the program policy.

resolver_public_key.description: Public key used to verify RAM-LFE execution receipts.

output_hex.description: Optional hex-encoded plaintext output bytes to compare against `receipt.payload.output_hash`.

program_id.description: RAM-LFE program identifier from the receipt.

valid.description: Whether the receipt validated against the published program policy.

haircut_bps.description: Haircut applied to the collateral leg in basis points.

margin_frequency_secs.description: Cadence between required margin checks in seconds.

asset_definition_id.description: Asset definition identifier associated with the leg.

metadata.description: Arbitrary Norito metadata captured alongside the leg.

quantity.description: Decimal representation of the leg quantity.

block_hash.description: Block hash at the requested height (hex).

state_root.description: Execution post-state root (hex) attested by the QC.

block_hash.description: Block hash at the requested height (hex).

source.description: Indicates whether the state root came from the commit QC or the block result Merkle root.

state_root.description: Execution post-state root (hex) derived from the commit QC or result Merkle root.

confidence_ok.description: Whether the confidence (MAD) is within configured bounds.

healthy.description: Overall health status (true when all checks pass).

min_samples_ok.description: Whether the minimum sample threshold is satisfied.

offset_ok.description: Whether the absolute offset is within configured bounds.

confidence_ms.description: Confidence interval (±ms) reported by the network time service.

fallback.description: Whether the response falls back to the local clock.

now.description: Network time in milliseconds since the UNIX epoch.

offset_ms.description: Estimated offset from the local clock in milliseconds.

peer_count.description: Number of peers with recent samples.

sample_count.description: Number of peer samples used in the aggregation.

count.description: Number of samples observed in the bucket.

le.description: Upper bound of the RTT bucket in milliseconds.

note.description: Human-readable status note from the network time service.

peers.description: Number of peers reporting time samples.

samples_used.description: Number of peer samples used in the aggregation.

count.description: Total number of RTT samples captured.

sum_ms.description: Cumulative RTT sample sum in milliseconds.

count.description: Number of samples collected from the peer.

last_offset_ms.description: Most recent offset measurement in milliseconds.

last_rtt_ms.description: Most recent round-trip time measurement in milliseconds.

info.description: HTTP surface for Torii. App endpoints accept optional canonical signing headers X-Iroha-Account/X-Iroha-Signature/X-Iroha-Timestamp-Ms/X-Iroha-Nonce.
info.title: Iroha Torii API

Expose Prometheus metrics in text format.
